hypotheses.description: Inspect the fall event and pre-fall trajectory before changing task performance terms.
hypotheses.rationale: The measured survival gate failed; stability is prerequisite evidence.

hypotheses.description: Inspect target-direction displacement and test gait timing, traction authority, or measured slip recovery on this fixed case.
hypotheses.rationale: Survival alone did not produce the required signed target-direction progress or the robot moved backward beyond the locked allowance.

hypotheses.description: Inspect signed pitch and yaw-invariant body tilt, then test bounded front/rear posture or foot-placement feedback before increasing gait authority.
hypotheses.rationale: Backward pitch, body pitch angle/rate, or quaternion-derived torso tilt exceeded the locked stability envelope.

hypotheses.description: Test delay-aware lateral-state feedback or foot-placement recovery without changing the fixed disturbance.
hypotheses.rationale: Measured lateral displacement exceeded the locked gate while the Controller owns the current recovery response.

hypotheses.description: Compare the commanded direction and speed with gait amplitude, phase, and planar feedback before changing the Task.
hypotheses.rationale: The measured planar velocity error exceeded the locked command-tracking gate.

hypotheses.description: Inspect target-direction displacement and test gait timing, traction authority, or measured slip recovery on this fixed case.
hypotheses.rationale: Survival alone did not produce the required signed target-direction progress or the robot moved backward beyond the locked allowance.

hypotheses.description: Compare the commanded direction and speed with gait amplitude, phase, and planar feedback before changing the Task.
hypotheses.rationale: The measured planar velocity error exceeded the locked command-tracking gate.

hypotheses.description: Compare score terms and preserve the regressed fixed-case behavior before pursuing aggregate gains.
hypotheses.rationale: The case regressed beyond the locked baseline allowance.

hypotheses.description: Compare score terms and preserve the regressed fixed-case behavior before pursuing aggregate gains.
hypotheses.rationale: The case regressed beyond the locked baseline allowance.

stages.name: Command-conditioned locomotion
exitCriteria: All gating cases in the locked command-tracking Benchmark pass.
Every accepted Controller remains compatible with the declared Assembly interface.

stages.name: Transitions, braking, and visible motion quality
exitCriteria: All gating transition cases pass without regression against command-tracking.
A human-reviewed witness shows accepted motion without unresolved severe visual hypotheses.

stages.name: Robustness and sim-to-real evidence
exitCriteria: All gating held-out plant cases pass with immutable Policy and calibration provenance.
Shadow hardware capture preserves safety, state ABI, and Judge identities.

northStar.statement: Follow bounded planar velocity and yaw commands across held-out plant variation while preserving governed shadow-commissioning evidence.

interventionSurfaces.rationale: The case regressed beyond the locked baseline allowance.
